blocks.content: Larry found a table near the back wall. Not isolated, not obvious. Somewhere in the middle of nowhere.
A kid sat down across from him a few minutes later. Didn't ask. Just sat.

blocks.speaker: DeShawn
blocks.content: Cause he been looking for somebody over here for the last five minutes.
Larry looked up. Jonathan was mid-conversation at the center table — but his eyes swept the room slowly, the way you scan for something you've already lost.
They landed on Larry. For a second they just looked at each other across the cafeteria.

blocks.prompt: Jonathan found you. What does Larry do?

options.label: Give him a nod. You see him.
Look back down. Not ready for that conversation.
